title: HarderSpawns
description: Control what health, hunger and potion effects players will respawn and first join spawn with!
body:
# HarderSpawns

 This plugin allows you to control what health, hunger and potion effects your players will respawn and first join spawn with(can be different values!). Simply set the values you want in the config and restart your server!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/jkoXTrbw8xs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Config.yml
```
first_join_health: 10.0
first_join_hunger: 10
first_join_potion_effects:
  - SLOW 600 1

respawn_health: 10.0
respawn_hunger: 10
respawn_potion_effects:
  - SLOW 600 1
```

## Info
Please let me know if you run into any bugs by joining my [Discord](https://discord.gg/aXpaYrmJA8) support server! I am willing to take suggestions as well!
